title: Abortion could save Biden in Pennsylvania, Arizona
shortDescription: New polling shows Biden lagging behind Trump in most swing states. What could help the president's campaign: his popular stance on abortion.

title: Who has more influence over voters? Beyonce, Elon Musk or the Obamas?
shortDescription: Not this time around. Celebrities and influencers won't have much of an impact on a Biden and Trump presidential rematch, a new USA TODAY poll shows.

title: Pardoned felons back in Trump's orbit for 2024 run
shortDescription: Concerns are growing that a Trump win would open the door to his administration ignoring legal constraints knowing that pardons are very possible.

title: Can Trump be president if convicted of a crime?
shortDescription: The U.S. Constitution lists the requirements to become the president of the United States but no mention of criminal convictions

title: Biden to debate Trump: Here's what the candidates may spar about
shortDescription: From climate change to foreign policy, a look at some of the topics that Biden and Trump might face during the debates.

title: When is Georgia's primary election? Plus 3 more states with primaries
shortDescription: Presidential and state primaries in four states on May 21 - including MTG's bid for re-election.

title: Image of Donald, Melania Trump with Stormy Daniels is fake | Fact check
shortDescription: The original image taken in 2005 was digitally edited to add Daniels and remove Ivanka Trump.

title: Former Trump attorney John Eastman pleads not guilty in Arizona
shortDescription: John Eastman was the first of 18 people indicted last month to appear in an Arizona court to answer charges stemming from the 2020 election.

title: Biden leads among Black and Hispanic voters, polling shows
shortDescription: Ahead of the first presidential debate, polling shows a large portion of the electorate undecided or open to changing their vote.

title: False claim that Biden banned talking about the Bible | Fact check
shortDescription: The president did not and cannot ban talking about the Bible. That would violate the First Amendment.

title: Es falso que Biden prohibió hablar de la Biblia | Hechos
shortDescription: El presidente no prohibió ni puede prohibir hablar de la Biblia. Eso violaría la Primera Enmienda.

title: Donald Trump in attendance as Barron graduates from high school
shortDescription: Barron's graduation became a headline after Trump fumed last month that he would not be able to attend the event because of the trial in New York.

title: Biden uses executive privilege to shield Hur interview | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Texas Gov. Greg Abbott pardoned the man who killed a Black Lives Matter protester in 2020. SCOTUS backs Biden on CFPB funding suit.

title: Chaos erupts in Congress over 'fake eyelashes' jab
shortDescription: Congresswomen Marjorie Taylor Greene and Jasmine Crockett got into a heated spar during a House Committee meeting.

title: Biden campaign tries to shore up Black voter support in Michigan
shortDescription: President Joe Biden will speak at a Detroit Branch NAACP dinner Sunday. His visit comes as his campaign aims to bolster its support among Black voters in Michigan.

title: Trump's field game in Arizona still minimal as Election Day nears
shortDescription: One former Trump campaign official wonders how much it will matter.
